value.rationale: Session management featuring rewind, fork, and non-interactive execution maps most closely to agent-memory, specifically the session lifecycle management sub-capability (e.g., sessions, fork, resume, rewind). Google's provider context points toward the google-antigravity-2-0-managed-agent-runtime or ADK lineage. The offering is a partial slice of agent-memory — it covers session control operations (rewind/fork/non-interactive) rather than full persistent cross-session memory. It is a feature-level offering within session management.
